notes: Developer platform plan lifecycle now has real Chrome coverage: create/edit/delete through UI, API read-back for all core fields, invalid tier 400, subscribed-plan delete 409, developer-only API enforcement with enterprise 403, and screenshot evidence. Full Chrome smoke is now 18/18. Inventory alert / 库存预警 is explicitly out of scope and must not be restored; remaining warning concepts are labor risk/system announcement/face threshold only. Product Green remains Yellow for production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download beyond current slices.
